text:
Israel’s aerial campaign in Beirut and its suburbs, and ground operations in southern Lebanon, have displaced more than 800,000 people and killed 850, according to Lebanese authorities.
Israeli strikes across Iran have “caused massive breakdowns in the regime’s operations and communications abilities,” Shosh Bedrosian, a spokeswoman in the Israeli prime minister’s office, said in a news briefing on Sunday.
Of the over 7,000 strikes the Israeli military says it has carried out in Iran since the war was launched just over two weeks ago, Ms. Bedrosian said 4,700 have struck sites related to Iran’s ballistic missile program, and 2,000 targeted “headquarters facilities and regime assets.”
The average price for a gallon of gas in the U.S. has hit $3.70, up from $3.45 a week ago and $2.93 a month ago, the AAA motor club said on Sunday. Energy Secretary Chris Wright said earlier in the day that there were “no guarantees” that oil prices would fall in the near future.
title: Trump adds to speculation about Iranian leader’s condition.

citability.title: Trump adds to speculation about Iranian leader’s condition.
